title: TVK extends open invitation to VCK, IUML to be part of Tamil Nadu Cabinet
description: “We invite VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan to be part of the Council of Ministers. This is the wish of the Chief Minister as well. Similarly, the IUML should also join the Council of Ministers. We have conveyed our invitation to IUML leaders,” Minister Aadhav Arjuna told reporters in Chennai.
